entries.title: Verify Execution Log in local browser
entries.command: python3 -m http.server 8765 --bind 127.0.0.1; browser QA at http://127.0.0.1:8765/
entries.output_summary: Execution Log loaded all records, keyboard tab semantics remained intact, visual inspection found no overlap or clipping in light mode, and the browser console reported zero JavaScript errors.

entries.title: Run different-seed 10-second ACE-Step diagnostic
entries.command:
printf 'BEFORE RESOURCE SNAPSHOT
'; df -h /; sysctl vm.swapusage; python3 pilots/clpr_stage0/scripts/run_ace_smoke.py --duration 10 --seed 43 --output pilots/clpr_stage0/runs/ace_smoke_seed43.flac --timeout 480; printf '
AFTER RESOURCE SNAPSHOT
'; df -h /; sysctl vm.swapusage

entries.title: Validate different-seed artifact and media properties
entries.command:
shasum -a 256 pilots/clpr_stage0/runs/ace_smoke_seed42_a.flac pilots/clpr_stage0/runs/ace_smoke_seed43.flac; ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration,size:stream=codec_name,sample_rate,channels -of json pilots/clpr_stage0/runs/ace_smoke_seed43.flac; python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
a=json.loads(Path('pilots/clpr_stage0/runs/ace_smoke_seed42_a.flac.json').read_text())
b=json.loads(Path('pilots/clpr_stage0/runs/ace_smoke_seed43.flac.json').read_text())
assert a['output_sha256'] != b['output_sha256']
assert a['request']['seed'] == 42 and b['request']['seed'] == 43
print('Different-seed diagnostic: PASS; seed 42 and seed 43 produced different hashes')
PY

entries.title: Record local safety-gate result
entries.command: Hermes patch: TODO.md, HISTORY.md, pilots/clpr_stage0/README.md, index.html
entries.output_summary: Marked the different-seed diagnostic complete, documented the 24-to-12 GiB free-disk drop and 2.2-to-14.2 GiB swap growth, recorded the server shutdown, and deferred 60/90-second generation to a 48/80 GB GPU.

entries.title: Remove stale self-referential ledger hashes
entries.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; p=Path('execution-log.json').resolve(); d=json.loads(p.read_text()); [(o.pop('sha256',None),o.pop('size_bytes',None),o.update({'kind':'ledger-self-reference'})) for e in d['entries'] for o in e.get('outputs',[]) if Path(o['path']).resolve()==p]; p.write_text(json.dumps(d,indent=2)+'\n')"

entries.title: Validate Stage 0 safety checkpoint
entries.command: PYTHONPATH=scripts python3 -m unittest scripts.tests.test_execution_ledger -v && PYTHONPATH=pilots/clpr_stage0/src python3 -m unittest discover -s pilots/clpr_stage0/tests -v && (cd pilots/dual_representation && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_pilot.py -v) && python3 -m json.tool execution-log.json >/dev/null && git diff --check && df -h / && sysctl vm.swapusage && test -z "" && echo 'Port 8001 closed'
